subcodes.first_line: To him who is looking unto God! O thou who art gazing unto the Center of the Covenant -- may God confirm thee!
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @The Holy Spirit, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
